1808150.name: Eggstinct!
1808150.description:
A Prehistoric Party Gone Wrong

With DOOM LOOMING and the ASTEROID ZOOMING TOWARDS YOU: It is your sacred dino duty to save the eggs from utter Eggstinction! Jump on bounce plants, bounce them off walls, belly slide into the air; create unique trick combinations to increase your score and save the eggs in STYLE.

Play Together, Save Together!

Who said you're the only hero in this story? You're gonna need some help if you want to save as many eggs as you can! Whether it’s flinging eggs across lava flows, bashing through collapsing caves, or soaring over geysers, Eggstinct! thrives on chaotic cooperation. Every run is a comedy of survival—full of triumph, disaster, and laughter as you adapt to unpredictable environments and your friends’ equally unpredictable physics.

Meet the Dino Crew

  • T-Rex – Tosses eggs (and teammates) across danger zones.

  • Triceratops – Bashes through boulders and carries multiple eggs.

  • Spinosaurus – Swims effortlessly through rivers and rapids.

  • Pterodactyl – Glides short distances while clutching fragile cargo.

Each dino brings new strategies and surprises, making every team combo feel fresh and frantic.

Survive Wild, Ever-Changing Worlds

Traverse lush jungles, volcanic islands, storm-tossed beaches, and more! Every biome features randomly generated puzzles, challenges, environmental traps, and unique egg types with surprising properties. You’ll need to adapt, improvise, and evolve your teamwork to bring every egg home intact.

Built for Chaos. Designed for Laughter.

Eggstinct! is all about momentum, mayhem, and memorable moments. Each mission tests your timing, coordination, and creative problem-solving through dynamic physics and reactive environments. Failure is hilarious, and success feels like a prehistoric miracle.

A Message From The Creator!

Hello! My name is Jesse Jenkins, and I'm the Founder of Manaforce Studios, and Creator of Eggstinct! Our super small team is the culmination of some incredible talent that has been affected by layoffs across the games industry. It was a direct result of these layoffs that Eggstinct! was born! 

We've all been working in the industry for a long time; we gots a lot of experience!.. But this is our first ever indie title that we're all cooking up from scratch. I was a technical Sound Designer on a Star Wars game, we've got some folks from Star Citizen, and even some peeps that worked on games like Assassin's Creed! Does it seem like we should be trying to make THE NEXT AAA BLOCKBUSTER GAME with our experience?! If you think so, I'll politely say: NAH!

Eggstinct! is something we knew we could achieve with our resources and talent, and it would be wrong of us to promise something we can't deliver, so guess what, WE'RE DELIVERING! Eggstinct! is a super fun, goofy coop experience that you can play online OR SPLITSCREEN! (Yeah, we're bringing that back!) Toss your friends, smack em' in the head with eggs, and soak up the sunshine until the asteroid comes and obliterates everything! With all of that said, we really appreciate your support in making our first game a reality; we may have experience, but we're a small team with families to take care of, so every bit of your support makes a TREMENDOUS impact!
